name: @ehrbase-ui/openehr-base
description: openEHR BASE 1.1.0 (matches RM 1.1.0 + EHRbase 2.31.0 per ADR-0032 addendum) — identifiers, object references, foundational + resource types. Generated from openEHR/specifications-ITS-JSON via json-schema-to-zod; polymorphic refs hand-stitched in the facade.
